table.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top;

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: The logical name of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Information about the use of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Minimum and Maximum # of times the element can appear in the instance

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px; width: 100px

a.title: Reference to the type of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck1.png)

a.title: Abstract model of one Version within a Version container, containing data, commit audit trail, and the identifier of its Contribution.

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

a.style: padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; border: 1px maroon solid; font-weight: bold; color: #301212; background-color: #fdf4f4;; padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; border: 1px maroon solid; font-weight: bold; color: #301212; background-color: #fdf4f4;
a.title: This element has or is affected by constraints ( Owner_id_valid, Preceding_version_uid_validity, Lifecycle_state_ valid )

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
This is an abstract type. Child types: IMPORTED_VERSION, ORIGINAL_VERSION
Abstract model of one Version within a Version container, containing data, commit audit trail, and the identifier of its Contribution.
Constraints: Owner_id_valid, Preceding_version_uid_validity, Lifecycle_state_ valid

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

a.title: Contribution in which this version was added.

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: Contribution in which this version was added.

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

a.title: OpenPGP digital signature or digest of content committed in this Version.

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: OpenPGP digital signature or digest of content committed in this Version.

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck00.png)

a.title: Audit trail corresponding to the committal of this version to the `VERSIONED_OBJECT`.

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: Audit trail corresponding to the committal of this version to the `VERSIONED_OBJECT`.

description.value: Unique identifier of this `VERSION`, in the form of an `{object_id, a version_tree_id, creating_system_id}` triple, where the `_object_id_` has the same value as the containing `VERSIONED_OBJECT _uid_`.
Unique identifier of the version of which this version is a modification; Void if this is the first version.
Lifecycle state of this version; coded by openEHR vocabulary `version lifecycle state`.
A canonical serial form of this Version, suitable for generating reliable hashes and signatures.
Copy of the owning `VERSIONED_OBJECT._uid_` value; extracted from the local `_uid_` property's `_object_id_`.
True if this Version represents a branch. Derived from `_uid_` attribute.
Abstract model of one Version within a Version container, containing data, commit audit trail, and the identifier of its Contribution.

short.value: Abstract model of one Version within a Version container, containing data, commit audit trail, and the identifier of its Contribution.

definition.value: Abstract model of one Version within a Version container, containing data, commit audit trail, and the identifier of its Contribution.

human.value: Preceding version uid validity must be present
Lifecycle state valid must be present

short.value: Contribution in which this version was added.

definition.value: Contribution in which this version was added.

short.value: OpenPGP digital signature or digest of content committed in this Version.

definition.value: OpenPGP digital signature or digest of content committed in this Version.

short.value: Audit trail corresponding to the committal of this version to the `VERSIONED_OBJECT`.

definition.value: Audit trail corresponding to the committal of this version to the `VERSIONED_OBJECT`.

short.value: Abstract model of one Version within a Version container, containing data, commit audit trail, and the identifier of its Contribution.

definition.value: Abstract model of one Version within a Version container, containing data, commit audit trail, and the identifier of its Contribution.

human.value: Preceding version uid validity must be present
Lifecycle state valid must be present

short.value: Contribution in which this version was added.

definition.value: Contribution in which this version was added.

short.value: OpenPGP digital signature or digest of content committed in this Version.

definition.value: OpenPGP digital signature or digest of content committed in this Version.

short.value: Audit trail corresponding to the committal of this version to the `VERSIONED_OBJECT`.

definition.value: Audit trail corresponding to the committal of this version to the `VERSIONED_OBJECT`.
